calendar.matters:
Petition To Transfer Jurisdiction Of Trust & Trust Property; & Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-14-297428 In The Matter of Minor Trust dated March 17, 2004 and PTR-14-297429 In The Matter of Minimus 2004 Trust dated March 17, 2014.

Appearances: Kevin Rodriguez for Lawrence Solomon (Trustee).

Mr. Rodriguez spoke of the differences between Nevada law and California law with regard to Trusts, stated that he does not believe there are any tax consequences because the Bolinas Ranch and the investments are still here, that he believes situs of the Trust will be Nevada, that there is more flexibility, and that Nevada allows directed Trusts and decanting of Trusts. The Court approved both Petitions to Transfer Jurisdiction of Trust & Trust Property, etc. (subject to review of the orders).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jones. (Not Reported)

Petition To Transfer Jurisdiction Of Trust & Trust Property; & Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Continued To May-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-14-297428 The Matter of Minor 2004 Trust and PTR-14-297429 The Matter of Minimus 2004 Trust.

Appearances: Michael Varela for Lawrence Solomon.

Mr. Varela addressed the issue of taking the Trusts out of the State of California to the State of Nevada, the new Trustee not being a resident of California, tax purposes/benefits to the Beneficiary, the limited partnerships, etc. Both Petitions to Transfer Jurisdiction of Trust, etc. were continued to May 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of amendments which are to present additional basis.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Tamara Willat, CSR #4609. Bailiff: Deputy Allen.
